meta.poznamky: jumpTo(50,50), dot(), jumpTo(270,50), dot()... 4 rohy canvasu. Souřadnicový systém.

cms.task_text: Skočte na [hlp]4 rohy plátna[/hlp] (50,50), (270,50), (270,270), (50,270) a na každém místě udělejte tečku.
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_jump_to" x="50" y="50"><value name="X"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">50</field></shadow></value><value name="Y"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">50</field></shadow></value><next><block type="turtle_dot"><next><block type="turtle_jump_to"><value name="X"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">270</field></shadow></value><value name="Y"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">50</field></shadow></value><next><block type="turtle_dot"><next><block type="turtle_jump_to"><value name="X"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">270</field></shadow></value><value name="Y"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">270</field></shadow></value><next><block type="turtle_dot"><next><block type="turtle_jump_to"><value name="X"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">50</field></shadow></value><value name="Y"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">270</field></shadow></value><next><block type="turtle_dot"></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
